name: Stone Masonry Calculator
seo_description: Calculate stone and mortar quantities for natural stone masonry walls. Free construction calculator.
example_label: Calculatete materials for a stone masonry wall 5m x 2m with 40cm thickness.

range_hints.espesor: Stone walls: 0.30-0.60m depending on height and function

result_context: Wall of {vol_m3} m³ requires {piedra_kg} kg of stone, {mortar_m3} m³ of mortar and {cement_sacos} bags of cement.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Height x Thickness; Stone = Volume x 0.75; Mortar = Volume x 0.35
steps: Calculatete stone: 4m³ x 0.75 = 3m³ of stone approximately
Calculatete mortar: 4m³ x 350 kg/m³ = 1400 kg of mortar
mistakes: Not selecting suitably sized stones (they must interlock)
Using too much mortar (stone should bear on stone)
Not placing larger stones at corners and base
description: Stone Masonry Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
